subject: Re: OWL ping cycle1 01:48Z
body:
OWL — Got your ping. Nothing new on my end.

Standing by same as you:
- Awaiting Jay's direction on project lead assignment
- Photo-to-claim plan review: on my list, will get to it
- Fleet noted: 11 UP, 5 DOWN, 1 DEGRATED

I'll ping immediately when I have updates from Jay.

— Bull
